title: User Settings
subtitle: Manage your personal and security preferences.
personalInfoDescription: Update your contact and profile information.
emailDisabledNote: Email cannot be modified. Contact system administrator.
changePasswordDescription: Update your password regularly for better security.
passwordUpdatedDescription: Your password has been updated successfully
passwordWeakErrorDescription: Password must be at least medium strength
notificationsDescription: Configure how and when you want to receive notifications.
pushNotificationsDescription: Receive instant notifications in your browser
projectUpdatesDescription: Notifications about changes in assigned projects
salesAlertsDescription: Notifications about new opportunities and closes
securityDescription: Protect your account with additional security measures.
twoFactorDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account
autoLogoutDescription: Log out after 30 minutes of inactivity
configurationSavedDescription: Your preferences have been updated successfully
